open-pdf-get-page-count.title: Open PDF and Get Page Count
open-pdf-get-page-count.description: Shows how to load a PDF file from disk using Aspose.Pdf.Document and retrieve the total number of pages in the document.

open-pdf-from-filestream-and-save.title: Open PDF from FileStream and Save to New File
open-pdf-from-filestream-and-save.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF document using a FileStream and saving it to another file with default settings using Aspose.Pdf.

open-pdf-without-password-handle-excepti.title: Open PDF Without Password and Handle InvalidPasswordException
open-pdf-without-password-handle-excepti.description: Demonstrates attempting to open a password‑protected PDF using Aspose.Pdf, catching the InvalidPasswordException, and handling the error gracefully.

save-pdf-to-memory-stream-and-write-to-f.title: Save PDF to MemoryStream and Write to File
save-pdf-to-memory-stream-and-write-to-f.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, saving it into a MemoryStream, and then writing the stream contents to a new file.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Metadata Preservation
convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A-1b compliance while preserving its metadata, and save the resulting file using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-as-pdfx3-with-color-profiles.title: Export PDF as PDF/X‑3 with Color Profiles
export-pdf-as-pdfx3-with-color-profiles.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, converting it to PDF/X‑3 compliance while preserving embedded color profiles, and saving the converted document.

encrypt-pdf-with-passwords-restrict-prin.title: Encrypt PDF with Passwords and Restrict Printing
encrypt-pdf-with-passwords-restrict-prin.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using user and owner passwords, apply specific permissions, and disable printing using Aspose.Pdf.

decrypt-encrypted-pdf.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF with User Password
decrypt-encrypted-pdf.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF using Aspose.Pdf, decrypt it, and save an unprotected copy.

add-blank-page-to-pdf-document.title: Add Blank Page to PDF Document
add-blank-page-to-pdf-document.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf, append a new blank page, and save the modified document.

insert-pdf-page-into-another-pdf.title: Insert PDF Page into Another PDF at Specific Position
insert-pdf-page-into-another-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a page from one PDF into another PDF at a given position using Aspose.Pdf's Pages.Insert method.

remove-third-page-from-pdf.title: Remove Third Page from PDF
remove-third-page-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete the third page of a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and save the modified file.

split-pdf-into-single-page-files.title: Split PDF into Single‑Page Files
split-pdf-into-single-page-files.description: Demonstrates how to load a multi‑page PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and save each page as an individual PDF file.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b
batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, convert each to PDF/A‑1b compliance with Aspose.Pdf, log conversion issues, and save the output files.

encrypt-pdf-stream.title: Encrypt PDF from Stream and Write to Output Stream
encrypt-pdf-stream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from an input stream, applying AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, and saving the secured PDF to an output stream using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdfx3-document-three-pages.title: Create PDF/X‑3 Document with Three Pages
create-pdfx3-document-three-pages.description: Shows how to create a new PDF, add three blank pages, convert it to PDF/X‑3 compliance, and save the resulting file.

update-pdf-title-metadata.title: Update PDF Title Metadata from Byte Array
update-pdf-title-metadata.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array, changing its Title metadata, and saving the modified document to disk using Aspose.Pdf.

load-pdf-with-custom-loadoptions-disable.title: Load PDF with Custom LoadOptions and Save
load-pdf-with-custom-loadoptions-disable.description: Demonstrates opening an existing PDF using HtmlLoadOptions (setting IsEmbedFonts to false) and then saving it back to PDF, including a file existence check.

append-page-incremental-save.title: Append Page to PDF Using Incremental Save
append-page-incremental-save.description: Demonstrates opening an existing PDF with read/write access, adding a new blank page with a text fragment, and saving the document using Aspose.Pdf's incremental update mode so only the changes are written.

compress-pdf-default-settings.title: Compress PDF with Default Settings
compress-pdf-default-settings.description: Demonstrates how to reduce a PDF file size by applying Aspose.Pdf's default optimization (object compression) and saving the result, then compares the original and compressed sizes.

export-pdf-pages-to-separate-files.title: Export PDF Pages to Separate Files
export-pdf-pages-to-separate-files.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and save each page as an individual PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

load-pdf-from-stream-set-version-1-4.title: Load PDF from Stream and Set Version to 1.4
load-pdf-from-stream-set-version-1-4.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a MemoryStream, converting its PDF version to 1.4 using Document.Convert, and saving the updated file to disk.

encrypt-pdf-allow-form-fill-disable-extr.title: Encrypt PDF with Form Filling Permission Only
encrypt-pdf-allow-form-fill-disable-extr.description: Loads an existing PDF, encrypts it with user and owner passwords, and sets permissions to allow only form filling while disabling content extraction, then saves the encrypted file.

create-pdfa1b-with-text-paragraph.title: Create PDF/A-1b Document with Text Paragraph
create-pdfa1b-with-text-paragraph.description: The example creates a new PDF document, adds a text paragraph to the first page, converts the file to PDF/A‑1b compliance, and saves it.

rotate-second-page-pdf-90-degrees.title: Rotate Second Page of PDF by 90 Degrees
rotate-second-page-pdf-90-degrees.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate the second page 90° clockwise, and save the modified document.

update-pdf-author-metadata.title: Update PDF Author Metadata with Aspose.Pdf
update-pdf-author-metadata.description: Shows how to open a PDF file, modify its Author metadata, and overwrite the original file using Aspose.Pdf in C#.

batch-encrypt-pdfs.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with a User Password
batch-encrypt-pdfs.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a directory using the same user and owner passwords, applying specific permissions and saving the encrypted files to a separate folder.

batch-decrypt-encrypted-pdfs.title: Batch Decrypt Encrypted PDFs with Owner Password
batch-decrypt-encrypted-pdfs.description: Shows how to open multiple password‑protected PDF files using a shared owner password, remove their encryption, and save unprotected copies.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b Preserving Structure and Fonts
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set conversion options for PDF/A-1b while keeping the original document structure and embedded fonts, and save the resulting PDF/A-1b file.

compress-pdf-high-optimization.title: Compress PDF with High Optimization Settings
compress-pdf-high-optimization.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying high‑level compression via OptimizationOptions, and saving the result while reporting size reduction.

download-pdf-from-url-and-save-locally.title: Download PDF from URL and Save Locally with Aspose.Pdf
download-pdf-from-url-and-save-locally.description: Shows how to download a PDF file from a network URL using HttpClient, load it into an Aspose.Pdf Document from a stream, and save it to a local file.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-disable-printing.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Disable Printing
encrypt-pdf-aes256-disable-printing.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256, set custom permissions to disallow printing, and verify the encryption status.

change-pdf-version-to-1-5-incremental-up.title: Change PDF Version to 1.5 with Incremental Update
change-pdf-version-to-1-5-incremental-up.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a new document with PDF version 1.5, copies all pages, and saves the result using Aspose.Pdf's incremental update feature.

change-pdf-passwords.title: Change PDF Passwords with Aspose.Pdf
change-pdf-passwords.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF, modify its user and owner passwords, and save the document with the new credentials using Aspose.Pdf.

split-pdf-at-page-ten.title: Split PDF into Two Parts at Page Ten
split-pdf-at-page-ten.description: Shows how to split a PDF into two separate documents at page 10 using Aspose.Pdf, including validation, page range extraction, and saving each part with descriptive filenames.

set-pdf-document-title-and-verify.title: Set PDF Document Title and Verify It
set-pdf-document-title-and-verify.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set its document title metadata, save the file, and then reopen it to confirm the title was applied correctly.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b__v2.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑1b with Font Embedding
convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A‑1b compliance (automatically embedding missing fonts), and save the archival‑ready document using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-cmyk.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X-3 with CMYK Color Space
convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-cmyk.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/X‑3 compliance while forcing all colors to CMYK using an ICC profile, and save the resulting file.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b__v2.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b with CSV Log
batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b__v2.description: Demonstrates converting multiple PDF files to PDF/A-1b using Aspose.Pdf, saving the converted files, and logging each conversion result to a CSV file.

rotate-third-pdf-page-180-degrees.title: Rotate Third PDF Page by 180 Degrees
rotate-third-pdf-page-180-degrees.description: Shows how to load a PDF (optionally from a byte array), rotate the third page 180 degrees, and save the modified document.

encrypt-pdf-user-password-restrict-editi.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password and Restrict Editing/Copying
encrypt-pdf-user-password-restrict-editi.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF with a user password only, allowing printing while disabling editing and content extraction using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-allow-form-fill.title: Encrypt PDF Allowing Only Form Filling
encrypt-pdf-allow-form-fill.description: Loads a PDF, applies AES‑256 encryption with permissions limited to form filling, and saves the protected document.

split-pdf-into-single-page-folders.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files in Separate Folders
split-pdf-into-single-page-folders.description: Demonstrates how to split a large PDF into individual page PDFs, placing each page in its own folder using Aspose.Pdf.

update-pdf-author-metadata__v2.title: Update PDF Author Metadata
update-pdf-author-metadata__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, replace the Author metadata with the current user name, and save the updated document.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-verify-size.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit RC4 and Verify Size Increase
encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-verify-size.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using 128‑bit RC4 encryption with Aspose.Pdf, then checks that the encrypted file size is slightly larger than the original.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-configurable-pas.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Configurable Passwords
batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-configurable-pas.description: Demonstrates how to read a list of PDF encryption jobs from a JSON configuration file, apply user and owner passwords with specific permissions, and log the results for each file.

convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-preserve-icc.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X‑3 Preserving ICC Profiles
convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-preserve-icc.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, converting it to PDF/X‑3 while keeping any existing ICC color profiles, and saving the result. Errors are logged to a file.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b-high-compr.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b with High Compression
batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b-high-compr.description: Demonstrates how to batch process PDF files, convert each to PDF/A-1b format with high compression using Aspose.Pdf, and generate a summary report of the conversion results.

add-custom-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom XMP Metadata to PDF
add-custom-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, inserting a custom XMP metadata packet, and saving the document while preserving the new metadata.

encrypt-pdf-owner-password-aes256.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password Only (AES-256)
encrypt-pdf-owner-password-aes256.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by setting only an owner password, disabling all user permissions, and applying AES‑256 encryption.

rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate each page by 180 degrees, and save the modified document.

encrypt-pdf-aes128-high-quality-print.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑128 and Enable High‑Quality Printing
encrypt-pdf-aes128-high-quality-print.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑128, set high‑quality printing permission, and verify the permission after opening the encrypted document.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v2.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑1b Compliance
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v2.description: Loads a PDF file, converts it to PDF/A‑1b compliance while logging conversion errors, and saves the compliant document.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-from-filename.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Passwords Derived from File Names
batch-encrypt-pdfs-from-filename.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf, generating deterministic passwords from each file name and storing them in a log.

split-pdf-into-sections-by-page-ranges.title: Split PDF into Sections Using Page Ranges
split-pdf-into-sections-by-page-ranges.description: Demonstrates how to read page‑range definitions from a text file and split a source PDF into separate section PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-with-form-fill-permission.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Form‑Fill Permission
encrypt-pdf-with-form-fill-permission.description: The example loads a PDF, applies user and owner passwords, grants only form‑filling permission while disabling printing, and saves the encrypted document using AES‑256 encryption.

set-pdf-metadata-author-title-subject.title: Set PDF Metadata (Author, Title, Subject)
set-pdf-metadata-author-title-subject.description: The example opens an existing PDF, sets its document information such as Author, Title, and Subject using Aspose.Pdf, saves the file, and then reopens it to verify the metadata.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-verify-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 and Verify Permissions
encrypt-pdf-rc4-verify-permissions.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using the RC4 128‑bit algorithm, disabling all permissions, and programmatically verifying the security settings by testing password access.
